introduction: Today, we will be exploring the significance of corporate wellness contracts to our overall revenue in FY2025. This will help us understand the financial impact of these contracts and guide future strategic decisions.

subsections.heading: Overview of FY2025 Revenue Streams
subsections.content:
• Telemedicine consultations contributed to 45% of total revenue
• Mental health and counselling services made up 20% of the revenue
• Remote patient monitoring services accounted for 15% of the revenue
• Medical equipment sales contributed to 10% of the total revenue
• 10% of revenue came from miscellaneous services, like health education and training
• Revenue from software and technology solutions remained stable, but showed potential for growth
subsections.justification: While this slide provides a broad overview of revenue streams, it doesn't specify the percentage related to corporate wellness contracts.

subsections.heading: Financial Contribution of Corporate Wellness Contracts
subsections.content:
• Corporate wellness programs included telemedicine, mental health, and health education services
• There was a steady YOY growth in corporate wellness contract sign-ups
• Significant investments were made into expanding corporate wellness offerings
• Majority of corporate wellness contracts were annual renewals
• The highest-grossing corporate wellness contract in FY2025 was with TechCorp Inc.
subsections.justification: Though the slide talks about corporate wellness contracts, it doesn't disclose their financial contribution to internal revenue.

subsections.heading: Comparative Analysis of Revenue Sources
subsections.content:
• Telemedicine consultations showed the highest profit margins
• Medical equipment sales had the lowest profit margins, suggesting a need for cost optimization
• Revenue from mental health and counselling services showed a steady upward trend
• Remote patient monitoring services had a high customer retention rate
• Health education and training services showed potential for increased profitability with better marketing
• Software and technology solutions had a moderate profit margin and steady growth rate
subsections.justification: This slide compares different revenue sources but doesn't specifically address the contribution of corporate wellness contracts to internal revenue.

conclusion: Our corporate wellness contracts have demonstrated a notable influence on our FY2025 revenue. Moving forward, we should focus on expanding this sector while maintaining diversification in our revenue sources.

image_queries.slide_title: Financial Contribution of Corporate Wellness Contracts
